# Intercom for Android

Get started on integrating the Intercom Messenger into your native Android app through these guides:

## [About the SDK (Android)](/installing-intercom/android/about-the-sdk)

Learn more about what you can do with the mobile SDK.

## [Setup](/installing-intercom/android/installation)

Setup the Intercom Messenger in the best way for your use-case.

## [Using Intercom](/installing-intercom/android/using-intercom)

Change the appearance and functions of the Messenger.

## [Help Center API](/installing-intercom/android/help-center-api-android)

Set up the Intercom Help Center.

## [Push Notifications](/installing-intercom/android/fcm-push-notifications)

Enable push notifications through Firebase Cloud in Intercom for your app.

## [Enable Identity Verification](/installing-intercom/android/secure-your-messenger)

Keep conversations and user information secure through Identity Verification.

## [Deep Linking](/installing-intercom/android/deep-linking)

Link through to pages within your app by setting up URIs.
